title: schnella coronata
intro: Schnella coronata, also known as the 'crowned speedwell', is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Schnella coronata include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Schnella coronata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used externally as a poultice or compress to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
